opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability on site.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered, sending emergency leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture and confirm plumbing appointments automatically.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 98 Google reviews at 4.4 stars with no CRM or reputation tools detected on site.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal disengagement to Boise customers researching local plumbers.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized review responses using AI trained on Boise Plumbing's service language and tone.

opportunities.label: Call Recording CRM Capture
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with zero CRM or marketing tools detected across the entire website.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call is lost with no record, follow-up, or recovery possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to track, transcribe, and follow up every inbound call.
